# Guarantee System Index

The goal of this section is to transform autonomous marketing from copy generation into an adaptive growth machine.

## Core doctrine

| File | Use |
|---|---|
| `001_guarantee_taxonomy.md` | Distinguish outcome guarantees, process guarantees, measurement guarantees, and offer guarantees. |
| `002_operating_law.md` | Core law for autonomous marketing agents. |
| `003_autonomous_success_equation.md` | Probability model for making success more likely. |
| `004_forced_learning_loop.md` | Loop that prevents a failed ad from becoming a dead end. |
| `005_demand_certainty_engine.md` | Find existing demand before spending heavily. |
| `006_offer_certainty_engine.md` | Make the offer strong enough to survive buyer skepticism. |
| `007_proof_certainty_engine.md` | Convert claims into visible proof. |
| `008_distribution_certainty_engine.md` | Avoid single-channel dependency. |
| `009_measurement_certainty_engine.md` | Avoid dashboard hallucination. |
| `010_budget_certainty_engine.md` | Kill, scale, and cap rules. |
| `011_buyer_state_diagnostics.md` | Diagnose buyer state before choosing tactics. |
| `012_no_conversion_debugger.md` | Root-cause tree for failed campaigns. |
| `013_failure_to_hypothesis_map.md` | Convert failure patterns into next actions. |
| `014_channel_market_fit_protocol.md` | Find where the product can reliably acquire attention. |
| `015_search_intent_capture_system.md` | Exploit high-intent search before cold persuasion. |
| `016_competitor_intercept_system.md` | Capture alternative-seeking demand. |
| `017_saas_trial_activation_system.md` | Convert ad click into product proof. |
| `018_landing_page_conversion_system.md` | Build pages that sell through proof paths. |
| `019_risk_reversal_offer_engine.md` | Use guarantees, trials, refunds, and proof-before-payment carefully. |
| `020_founder_led_trust_system.md` | Build trust without needing people to trust ads. |
| `021_ai_search_and_generative_engine_visibility.md` | Make products findable by answer engines. |
| `022_b2b_buying_committee_routes.md` | Route different stakeholders to different proof. |
| `023_autonomous_marketing_agent_loop_v2.md` | Agent loop for Claude/Codex execution. |
| `024_skill_harness_contract.md` | How skills should be invoked. |
| `025_markdown_memory_compounding.md` | How to record learning in Markdown. |
| `026_platform_experiment_playbook.md` | Google, Meta, TikTok, LinkedIn experiment surfaces. |
| `027_incrementality_and_lift_measurement.md` | Use lift, holdouts, and causal tests where possible. |
| `028_bayesian_bandit_allocation.md` | When to use bandits vs fixed A/B tests. |
| `029_when_to_ignore_dashboard_roas.md` | When platform ROAS is probably lying. |
| `030_guarantee_conditions.md` | Preconditions for stronger confidence. |
| `031_product_truth_adaptation.md` | Keep generated claims tied to product truth. |
| `032_offer_market_fit_thresholds.md` | Minimum thresholds before scaling. |
| `033_guaranteed_learning_sprint.md` | Seven-day learning sprint. |
| `034_30_day_to_first_signal.md` | 30-day first-signal plan. |
| `035_90_day_compounding_plan.md` | 90-day compounding plan. |
| `036_hard_rules_for_autonomous_ads.md` | Non-negotiable harness rules. |
| `037_harness_not_committee_v2.md` | Structure without committee drag. |
| `038_no_excuses_execution_protocol.md` | Anti-stall protocol. |
| `039_agent_context_ingestion_recipe.md` | How to load context into a coding agent. |
| `040_agent_prompt_master.md` | Master instruction for autonomous marketing agent. |
| `041_postmortem_to_next_campaign.md` | Turn postmortems into new campaign packets. |
| `042_final_guarantee_system_summary.md` | Concise doctrine summary. |

## The guarantee stance

A serious agent does not promise impossible certainty.

A serious agent promises that every run produces one of three useful artifacts:

1. a validated campaign winner,
2. a validated negative learning,
3. a sharper next hypothesis.

If it produces none of those, the agent failed.
